name: @ministryofmany/identity
description: Pure Semaphore v4 identity layer: deterministic device-seed -> per-context Identity derivation (one backed-up seed yields an unlinkable distinct commitment per context), a framework-agnostic PBKDF2-SHA256 + AES-GCM seed vault with a BIP-39 mnemonic backup, the per-device commitment lifecycle + revocation contract, and the structural SemaphoreIdentityLike shape the membership layer consumes. No Semaphore v3 or RLN in its dependency tree.
author: AtHeartEngineer
